It provides the following classes and functions:\\n\\n`MainActivity`: The main activity of the application that handles the user interface and interacts with the database.\\n\\n`setupCsvPicker()`: Sets up the activity result launcher for opening a CSV file.\\n\\n`openCsvPicker()`: Opens the document picker to select a CSV file.\\n\\n`setupMenu()`: Sets up the burger menu with options to load a CSV file or exit the application.\\n\\n`setupSpinners()`: Initializes the spinners for selecting the floor, room, and electrical consumer.\\n\\n`loadEtagen()`, `loadRaeume()`, `loadVerbraucher()`: Loads the available floors, rooms, and electrical consumers from the database and populates the corresponding spinners.\\n\\n`setupSearchButton()`: Sets up the search button functionality to retrieve and display the electrical circuit information based on the user\\u0027s selections.\\n\\n`showEmptyResult()`: Displays empty values in the result fields when no matching entry is found.\\n\\n`importCsv()`: Imports a CSV file, parses its contents, and stores the data in the database.\",\"/app/build/tmp/kapt3/stubs/debug/com/example/stromplanfinder/StromEintragDao.java\":\"This file defines an interface called `StromEintragDao` which is used for interacting with a Room database table called `stromEintraege`. The interface provides the following functions:\\n\\n`clearAll()`: Deletes all entries from the `stromEintraege` table.\\n\\n`insertAll(eintraege)`: Inserts a list of `StromEintragEntity` objects into the `stromEintraege` table.\\n\\n`getEtagen()`: Retrieves a list of distinct etage (floor) values from the `stromEintraege` table where `aktiv` is 1, ordered by etage.\\n\\n`getRaeume(etage)`: Retrieves a list of distinct raum (room) values from the `stromEintraege` table where `aktiv` is 1 and the etage matches the provided etage, ordered by raumnr.\\n\\n`getVerbraucher(etage, raum)`: Retrieves a list of distinct verbraucher (consumer) values from the `stromEintraege` table where `aktiv` is 1, the etage matches the provided etage, and the raum matches the provided raum, ordered by verbraucher.\\n\\n`findEintrag(etage, raum, verbraucher)`: Retrieves the first `StromEintragEntity` object from the `stromEintraege` table where `aktiv` is 1, the etage matches the provided etage, the raum matches the provided raum, and the verbraucher matches the provided verbraucher.\",\"/app/src/main/java/com/example/stromplanfinder/StromEintragEntity.kt\":\"This file defines a data class `StromEintragEntity` that represents an entity in a Room database table named `stromEintraege`.
